<?php namespace Spatie\Feed\Http; use Illuminate\Support\Str; use Spatie\Feed\Feed; use Spatie\Feed\Helpers\ResolveFeedItems; class FeedController { public function __invoke() { $feeds = config('feed.feeds'); $name = Str::after(app('router')->currentRouteName(), 'feeds.'); $feed = $feeds[$name] ?? null; abort_unless($feed, 404); $items = ResolveFeedItems::resolve($name, $feed['items']); return new Feed( $feed['title'], $items, request()->url(), $feed['view'] ?? 'feed::atom', $feed['description'] ?? '', $feed['language'] ?? 'en-US', $feed['image'] ?? '', $feed['format'] ?? 'atom', $feed['xsl'] ?? '', ); } }
